summary: Comprehensive Phase 3 testing completed for Inclusive Modern Dating Platform. Backend API fully functional (63/65 tests passed, 96.9% success rate). Frontend Phase 3 features working correctly with minor session management issues.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Bidirectional filter not showing Werner in Alice's results despite compatible preferences
flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Werner not appearing in discovery results
flaky_endpoints.workaround: May be due to preference matching logic or timing

flaky_endpoints.issue: RSVP count not updating immediately after successful RSVP
flaky_endpoints.workaround: RSVP is recorded but count display has delay

ui_bugs.issue: JWT token/session persistence issue - sessions expire quickly requiring frequent re-login

passed_tests: Phase 3 Email Verification: POST /api/auth/email/send-code returns dev_code
Phase 3 Email Verification: POST /api/auth/email/verify sets email_verified=true
Phase 3 MFA Setup: POST /api/auth/mfa/setup returns secret + otpauth_url
Phase 3 MFA Enable: Properly rejects invalid TOTP codes
Phase 3 MFA Login: POST /api/auth/login-mfa works without code for non-MFA accounts
Phase 3 Videos: POST /api/me/videos stores with moderation_status='pending'
Phase 3 Videos: Owner can see pending videos, others cannot
Phase 3 Videos: DELETE /api/me/videos/{id} removes video
Phase 3 Premium: POST /api/premium/upgrade sets premium_expires_at
Phase 3 Premium: GET /api/premium/status returns premium=true for upgraded users
Phase 3 Premium: GET /api/likes/received works for premium users, 402 for free users
Phase 3 Premium: POST /api/me/boost requires premium (402 for free users)
Phase 3 Premium: POST /api/messages/first requires premium
Phase 3 Events: POST /api/events creates events with title+starts_at
Phase 3 Events: GET /api/events lists upcoming events sorted by starts_at
Phase 3 Events: GET /api/events/{id} returns details with my_rsvp and counts
Phase 3 Events: POST /api/events/{id}/rsvp updates status
Phase 3 Events: DELETE /api/events/{id} - proper owner/admin permissions
Phase 3 Admin Roles: review@eros.app and support@eros.app exist with correct roles
Phase 3 Admin Roles: POST /api/admin/role allows admin to set roles
Phase 3 Admin Roles: content_reviewer can access /api/admin/moderation/photos
Phase 3 Admin Roles: content_reviewer blocked from /api/admin/ban (403)
Phase 3 Admin Roles: admin can access /api/admin/ban
Frontend Account Page: Email verification section shows verified status
Frontend Account Page: MFA setup generates secret and shows TOTP setup UI
Frontend Account Page: Premium section shows active status with upgrade date
Frontend Account Page: Premium features (Boost, Who liked me) are clickable
Frontend Account Page: Premium badge visible in header
Frontend Events Page: Navigation from header works
Frontend Events Page: Event creation modal with all form fields
Frontend Events Page: Event creation successful with toast notification
Frontend Events Page: Events display in grid with proper details
Frontend Events Page: RSVP buttons functional (Going/Interested/Pass)
Frontend Events Page: RSVP state changes after clicking

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (Phase 3 features working, session management issues persist)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix JWT token persistence/session management in frontend - sessions expire too quickly causing frequent re-login requirements. Minor backend issues: bidirectional discovery filter and RSVP count display timing.
